prompt: A moody graphic-novel style book cover illustration set in a snowy conifer forest at night, painted in deep blue tones with cinematic contrast. In the foreground, show exactly 4 human figures standing behind a low striped road barrier: 3 adults and 1 small child. The central adult is a tall broad-shouldered man in a dark winter jacket, holding the sleeping or limp child in his arms; the child wears a puffy {argument name="child coat color" default="purple"} snowsuit. To his left stands a teenage or young adult male with a backpack beside a dark parked SUV partially visible at the edge of the frame. To his right stands an adult woman in a dark hooded winter jacket, holding a flashlight that casts a warm cone of light onto the snow and the barrier. All faces should be mostly in shadow, unreadable, emphasizing mystery and danger. Place exactly 2 man-made warning elements in the foreground: 1 red-and-white striped gate blocking the path and 1 weathered warning sign on a wooden post showing a deer silhouette inside a red prohibition circle and slash. In the midground and background, fill the scene with tall black pine trees, a narrow snow-covered road or clearing, and a dead animal shape lying partly buried in the snow on the right side. In the far distance, show a rugged snow-streaked mountain under a star-filled sky. From behind the mountain, a single narrow vertical blue beam of light rises straight into the sky, acting as the focal point. Composition should be vertical, dramatic, and poster-like, suitable for a thriller or survival graphic novel cover for {argument name="book title" default="La Réserve"}. Style: detailed Franco-Belgian / realistic comic-book painting, inked outlines, textured brushwork, cold nocturnal atmosphere, subtle rim lighting, high contrast, ominous and suspenseful.
translatedPrompt: 一张充满情绪感的图像小说风格书籍封面插画，背景设定在夜晚的针叶雪林中，采用深蓝色调，具有电影般的对比度。在前景中，展示 4 个人物站在低矮的条纹路障后：3 名成年人和 1 名幼童。中间的成年人是一名身材高大、肩膀宽阔的男子，身穿深色冬装外套，怀里抱着一个正在睡觉或瘫软的孩子；孩子穿着一件 {argument name="child coat color" default="紫色"} 的雪服。在他左侧站着一名背着背包的少年或青年男性，旁边是一辆在画面边缘隐约可见的深色 SUV。在他右侧站着一名身穿深色连帽冬装外套的成年女性，手中拿着手电筒，将一束温暖的光锥投射在雪地和路障上。所有人的面部应大部分处于阴影中，无法辨认，以强调神秘感和危险感。在前景中放置 2 个明显的人造警示元素：1 个阻挡道路的红白条纹门，以及 1 个立在木柱上、带有红色禁止圆圈和斜杠的鹿形剪影警示牌。在中景和背景中，填充高大的黑松树、一条狭窄的积雪道路或空地，右侧雪地里半掩埋着一个动物尸体形状。在远方，展示一座在星空下布满积雪的崎岖山脉。从山后，一道狭窄的垂直蓝色光束直冲云霄，作为视觉焦点。构图应为垂直、具有戏剧性和海报感，适合作为 {argument name="book title" default="La Réserve"} 的惊悚或生存类图像小说封面。风格：细腻的法比漫画 / 写实漫画绘画风格，带有墨线轮廓，笔触质感丰富，寒冷的夜间氛围，微妙的轮廓光，高对比度，充满不祥与悬疑感。

breakdown.creativeCore: 暗夜森林惊悚小说封面：一张暗黑风格的图像小说封面，描绘了四名旅人在夜晚的雪林中被阻拦，上方有一道神秘的蓝色光束，非常适合惊悚或生存类小说。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.text: 要求精确文字；要求可读
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 电影海报、音乐封面、书籍封面、播客封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, cinematic]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: rim light, high contrast]。

Text requirements:
要求精确文字；要求可读。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
